title: iso20022-bank-profile-mcp
description: Bank clearing-profile Model Context Protocol server for the ISO 20022 MCP Suite: a fully local, closed-world server (no network, no sub-servers) that manages, validates, and serves the bank-specific ISO 20022 clearing profiles / rule packs that sit beyond structural XSD validation. It is a sibling of iso20022-readiness-suite-mcp, which can consume the profiles this server serves. Exposes 4 read-only tools over stdio: list the available clearing profiles as lightweight summaries (list_profiles); return one profile in full including its rule bodies (get_profile); evaluate a raw ISO 20022 payload against a profile and return findings (lint_payload); and validate a bank-supplied profile / rule-pack definition as raw JSON (validate_profile_definition). Bundled baseline profiles cover Generic, CBPR+, SEPA_Instant, and FedNow, with a register() seam for runtime-loaded premium rule packs; XML is parsed with defusedxml only. SLSA Build L3 provenance + PEP 740 sigstore attestations + CycloneDX/SPDX/licenses SBOMs on every release; NIST SP 800-218 SSDF practice IDs mapped in SECURITY.md.
